completed_tasks.name: Plan-checker retry completed
completed_tasks.note: Returned ## ISSUES FOUND: D-03/SNOW-02 narrowed to docs-only, SNOW-01 smoke can become state-changing, D-07 MDM secret-name blocker list partial, and 02-RESEARCH.md open questions unresolved.

remaining_tasks.name: Patch Phase 2 plan docs for the four plan-checker blockers
steps: Patch 02-02-PLAN.md and 02-VALIDATION.md so D-03/SNOW-02 includes a secret-safe credential checkpoint and dev-target dbt deps/compile/run/test --target dev evidence path.

Patch 02-02-PLAN.md so SNOW-01 first asserts the three prod backend.hcl files are absent and statically verifies deploy-snowflake-stack.sh checks backends before any state-changing Terraform/Snowflake/dbt/dashboard action.

Patch 02-01-PLAN.md so D-07 requires matrix/evidence blocked identifiers for edgartools-prod/mdm/postgres_dsn, edgartools-prod/mdm/neo4j, edgartools-prod/mdm/api_keys, and edgartools-prod/mdm/snowflake.
Patch 02-RESEARCH.md so Open Questions are explicitly resolved with the A1 ECR decision, the dev dbt credential-checkpoint decision, and Pattern 1 as plan of record for versions.tf.
Run direct gsd-sdk frontmatter and plan-structure checks for both plans.
Run targeted greps for MDM secret names, dev-target dbt commands, backend guard/static-order wording, and resolved open questions.
Only after those pass, continue Step 13 coverage gates and update STATE/ROADMAP.

blockers.description: Plan-checker found four content blockers in Phase 2 plans.
blockers.workaround: Patch the plan docs exactly as listed in remaining_tasks before Step 13.

blockers.description: Correct worktree is easy to miss because the shell may start elsewhere.
blockers.workaround: Use /Users/aneenaananth/gsd-workspaces/go-live/edgartools-platform for all commands; verify branch workspace/go-live and active workstream go-live before edits.

blockers.description: Prod AWS passive infrastructure, prod app summary, and prod Snowflake connection do not exist.
blockers.workaround: Phase 2 remains document-and-validate only; represent these as BLOCKED rows and required-fix commands.

human_actions_pending.action: Supply dev Snowflake/dbt credentials during Phase 2 execution if dev-precedent dbt validation is to run.
human_actions_pending.context: The plan must include a credential checkpoint and must record BLOCKED/failed evidence if credentials are unavailable.

decisions.decision: Do not continue to Step 13 until plan-checker blockers are patched.
decisions.rationale: The checker returned real content issues, not just a tooling failure.
D-01 prohibits prod terraform apply, prod app deploy, and prod Snowflake DDL in this phase.

decisions.decision: Use a guarded SNOW-01 smoke test if it remains in the plan.
decisions.rationale: The wrapper currently stops on backend.hcl before state-changing actions, but the plan must verify that condition before running it.

next_action: In /Users/aneenaananth/gsd-workspaces/go-live/edgartools-platform, patch only the Phase 2 planning docs for the four plan-checker findings, then run direct gsd-sdk validation before Step 13 coverage gates.
context_notes: This side conversation intentionally did not patch Phase 2 plans or advance the workflow. It only refreshed the handoff for Claude after a successful plan-checker retry found concrete issues.
